title: Epidendrum curvicolumna
taxonomy: Epidendrum curvicolumna is a species of orchid. This species belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants. Within the genus Epidendrum, it is classified as a species of terrestrial orchid, although it can also be found growing on trees. Epidendrum curvicolumna is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
